# Case ensure-chunk-change-to-promise-all: Step 1

## Changed Files
- file.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Bundle: file_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: vendors-node_modules_vue_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 94
- Update: file_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 447
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 703

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["file_js","main"],"r":["vendors-node_modules_react_js"],"m":["./node_modules/react.js"]}
```


## Update


### file_js.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./file.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules


#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("file_js", {
"./file.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  Vue: () => (/* reexport safe */ vue__rspack_import_0.Vue)
});
/* import */ var vue__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./node_modules/vue.js");



},

});
```



### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./chunk.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./chunk.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  test: () => (test)
});
function test(count) {
  return Promise.all(/* import() */ [__rspack_require.e("vendors-node_modules_vue_js"), __rspack_require.e("file_js")]).then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./file.js")).then(({ React, Vue }) => count === 0 ? React : Vue)
}


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
